notes: Unified the hosted Google login and Google Sheets/Drive access flow for Pathmark Online.
Google login now requests the narrow drive.file scope so the Web Companion can prepare a user-owned Pathmark sync sheet without a separate Connect Google Sheets step.
The Web Companion now attempts to find an existing app-visible Pathmark Sync sheet before creating a new one.
Reconnect and diagnostics remain available for recovery, while Supabase continues to store roles and access data only.
